since_last: 76% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.53%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 76% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.14% · BTC +1.06% · Gold -1.09% · Nasdaq100 +2.19%. 76% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.53%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.53%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.55%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -49.81%
cards.body: Leaders: KLAC +12.06%, AMAT +11.30%, PANW +8.84%, LRCX +8.71%, TSLA +8.12%. Laggards: HON -49.81%, SMCI -8.53%, DLR -2.27%, SYNA -1.66%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +6.36% at $162.97
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +6.36% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
